cards.front: What is Pandas library used for?
cards.back: It is used for data manipulation and analysis in Python

cards.front: What is NumPy library used for?
cards.back: It is used for numerical operations in Python
It is a 2-dimensional labeled data structure with columns of potentially different types
It is a one-dimensional labeled array of values

cards.front: What is Data Visualization in Python?
cards.back: It is the process of creating graphical representations of data to better understand it
